_doc: Microsoft stopped reporting Xbox unit sales in 2015. Every figure here is an analyst estimate or press-cited leak. Update via PR when a new credible figure is published. See CONTRIBUTING.md.

source.description: Analyst estimates for Xbox unit sales (Microsoft no longer reports).

facts.note: Widely-cited Ampere/Niko Partners estimate for Xbox One lifetime. Microsoft never disclosed a final number.
Aggregate analyst estimate from Omdia/Ampere/GamesIndustry.biz coverage. Update when a newer figure is published.
